mapper.sql: select e.event_id, e.rule_id, r.rule_name, e.family_id, f.family_name, e.member_id, m.member_name, e.asset_id, a.asset_name, e.event_title, e.rule_type, e.trigger_value, e.threshold_value, e.second_threshold_value, e.trigger_time, e.status, e.suggestion_text, e.detail_text from fin_alert_event e left join fin_alert_rule r on r.rule_id = e.rule_id left join fin_family f on f.family_id = e.family_id left join fin_member_account m on m.member_id = e.member_id left join fin_asset a on a.asset_id = e.asset_id
mapper.insert: insert into fin_alert_event( rule_id, family_id, member_id, asset_id, event_title, rule_type, trigger_value, threshold_value, second_threshold_value, trigger_time, status, suggestion_text, detail_text, create_time ) values ( #{ruleId}, #{familyId}, #{memberId}, #{assetId}, #{eventTitle}, #{ruleType}, #{triggerValue}, #{thresholdValue}, #{secondThresholdValue}, #{triggerTime}, #{status}, #{suggestionText}, #{detailText}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: select count(1) from fin_alert_event where rule_id = #{ruleId} and date(trigger_time) = curdate()
mapper.update: update fin_alert_event set status = #{status} where event_id = #{eventId}
